projects.name: GRDN
projects.note: Exit-65 root cause fixed (commit e27ba73, build 1.11.3+4). The rive_native plugin downloads its native library (librive_native.a) via a setup script that never ran on Xcode Cloud — so the archive couldn't find the file. ci_post_clone.sh now runs that setup step before the archive. High confidence this clears the rive_native failure.
projects.nextStep: Re-run the Xcode Cloud build. If archive still fails, the remaining suspect is Family Controls signing/provisioning across the 5 bundle IDs — paste the new error and Claude will pin it.

projects.name: SCANDALS
projects.note: v1.6.2 fixed the paper-size default (US Letter). Now reworking the capture method: the paper goes flat on the floor BESIDE the foot instead of under it — so the reference rectangle is never occluded and standard US Letter paper works for any foot size. Claude is building this now.
projects.nextStep: Capture rework in progress — Claude will report when it's shipped.

projects.name: HD-LOVE
projects.note: Launch polish done (demo screen, real Settings screen, Romantic/Friends/Networking matching with tagged matches). Claude is now building the go-live backend: real authentication, photo upload, and a live candidate feed.
projects.nextStep: Go-live backend build in progress — Claude will report what's built and any credentials you need to supply.

projects.name: irons-design
projects.note: Live on Cloudflare — resolving with valid SSL and the correct content.

projects.name: WEATHER
projects.note: App Store rejection (ITMS-90129) fixed; Mirror exercise now has a close button on every step. Code-complete at v1.3.0.
projects.nextStep: Confirm build 22 reached TestFlight and resubmit to App Store review.

projects.name: POSTURE
projects.note: Auto-capture (hands-free 4-view camera) shipped. Supabase keep-alive is running green — the project won't auto-pause anymore.
projects.nextStep: Smoke-test the auto-capture flow in Expo Go on your iPhone.

projects.name: Futon
projects.note: Homepage Progress section (rainbow SRS bars) shipped. Now standardizing the SRS mastery label on 'Mastered' everywhere — fixing the inconsistency where some screens said 'Perfected' and others 'Mastered'.

projects.name: PAPPY
projects.note: v2.5.10 (billing null-guard + crash fix) deployed to Firebase and live for users.

projects.name: irons-holistic
projects.note: Static recreation of irons.be deployed and live.

projects.name: PRIMAL
projects.note: On hold by your decision. This is the customer-facing 'Primal Moves' fitness-studio app (front-end built; Firebase + Stripe backend built and pushed). Paused to focus on the separate AI Voice Agent — the sales-agent MVP in the primal-agent repo. Distinct project from this one.

projects.name: AI Voice Agent
projects.note: Repo live on GitHub (giddyuptiger/primal-agent), auto-push wired. Dashboard complete and verified — full spec section 11 (unified inbox, live view, escalations queue, tickets, KB editor, metrics, auth); typecheck clean, 31/31 tests pass, boots in mock mode (commit 3c240c5). Claude is now building the last two unblocked pieces: the outbound campaign engine (build-order step 11) and an interactive voice test harness so the agent is demoable before Twilio is live.
projects.nextStep: Build in progress. Jeremy: kick off the Twilio A2P 10DLC registration now — carrier approval is the slowest step. See docs/PROVISIONING.md.
